news.summary: In Toronto, Flow Beverage Corp. (TSX:FLOW; OTCPK:FLWBF) revealed today that it has received $2 million from the secured convertible loan with RI Flow LLC. The agreement, first disclosed on June 4, 2025, outlines that RI Flow LLC will provide up to $6 million to Flow, pending specific conditions. To date, a total of $4 million has been advanced under this arrangement.
news.headline: Flow secures additional $2 million in convertible loan from RI Flow LLC, with total potential funding of $6 million.

news.summary: Bitcoin short liquidations exceeded $101 million when the top cryptocurrency surged to $110,000 on Thursday morning.
news.headline: Over $280M in crypto shorts liquidated as Bitcoin hits $110K, with $101M in BTC shorts closed.

news.summary: In Dublin, a new report titled "Agriculture Imaging Sensor Market Size, Share, Trends, Analysis, and Forecast 2025-2034" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global agriculture imaging sensor market is anticipated to achieve a valuation of USD 6.4 billion by 2034, indicating a significant growth rate at a CAGR of 15.7% from its recorded value of USD 1.7 billion in 2025. This analysis is designed to assist top management, strategists, business developers, sales managers, and other industry professionals.
news.headline: Global agriculture imaging sensor market to reach USD 6.4 billion by 2034, growing at 15.7% CAGR from USD 1.7 billion in 2025.

news.summary: Shift4 Payments, Inc. ("Shift4") and Global Blue Group Holding AG ("Global Blue") have confirmed the fulfillment of the tender offer facilitated by GT Holding 1 GmbH. Shift4, a key player in integrated payments and commerce tech (NYSE: FOUR), partnered with Global Blue (NYSE: GB), a leading specialty payments and tech provider for tax-free shopping and currency conversion. This strategic move aims to enhance offerings for major retail brands worldwide.
news.headline: Shift4 (FOUR) acquires Global Blue (GB); GT Holding 1 GmbH completes tender offer. Leader in payments technology aims to enhance commerce solutions.

news.summary: As a result of financial burdens from overwhelming debt, developing countries are struggling to meet their borrowing obligations. The lack of assistance from Washington has prompted some leaders to negotiate debt forgiveness agreements to alleviate the situation.
news.headline: Growing debt burdens in developing nations spark debt relief talks, as some leaders leverage politics amid unaffordable borrowing.

news.summary: Finnish company Valmet Oyj announced in a press release on July 3, 2025, that their Half Year Financial Review for January – June 2025 is scheduled to be released on July 23, 2025, at around 9:00 a.m. (EEST). The press release will be issued in Espoo, Finland. The information is expected to provide insights into the company's performance during the first half of the year.
news.headline: Valmet's Half Year Financial Review for Jan-Jun 2025 to be released on July 23, 2025 at 9:00 am Finnish time.

news.summary: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent addressed the possibility of replacing Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve chair, stating, "I will do what the President wants." In an interview with Bloomberg TV, Bessent highlighted the success of his department in areas such as tax cuts and trade deals, indicating satisfaction with his current position. He acknowledged ongoing considerations for Powell's replacement as his term ends in May 2026. Bessent suggested that an announcement on this matter could be made soon. JPMorgan advises caution on potential Fed rate cuts, predicting decreases in the dollar and bond yields. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Scott Bessent willing to replace Powell as Fed Chair if President wants. Ongoing momentum within Treasury Department. Announcement possible soon.
Firmenich to redeem €750 million hybrid bond issued by DSM.

news.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. has updated their forecast, expecting the Federal Reserve to implement three quarter-point interest rate cuts this year. This follows a shift in their outlook due to minimal tariff impacts and weaknesses in the labor market. Initially, the investment bank anticipated only one reduction in December, but they now project consecutive cuts of 25 basis points in September, October, and December. This adjustment is a response to mounting worries about economic growth despite tariffs being put into effect. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell has highlighted tariff pressures as a significant factor driving inflation, leading to an increase in the central bank's median core inflation forecast from 2.5% in December to 3.1% currently. These developments indicate a more cautious approach towards the economy's momentum in the coming months.
news.headline: Goldman Sachs predicts 3 Fed rate cuts in 2025 due to weak jobs data and modest Trump tariff impact.

news.summary: On July 1, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. declared that AMAROQ MINERALS LTD., an independent mine development corporation, has met the requirements to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. This market, operated by OTC Markets Group Inc., oversees the trading of 12,000 U.S. and international securities. AMAROQ MINERALS LTD. (TSX-V: AMRQ; AIM: AMRQ; XICE: AMRQ; OTCQX: AMRQF) moved up from the Pink® market to the OTCQX, demonstrating its eligibility and compliance for this higher trading tier.
news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes Amaroq Minerals Ltd to OTCQX as an independent mine development corp.

news.summary: In New York, Ziff Davis, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZD) has confirmed the successful completion of three acquisitions in the second quarter of 2025. These strategic acquisitions aim to bolster Ziff Davis' worldwide customer portfolio, facilitate entry into fresh market segments, and diversify the company's range of products. The acquisitions include Forensic and Compliance Systems in cybersecurity and Martech, Email Industries in cybersecurity and Martech, and Well+Good in the Health & Wellness sector. While specific financial details of each acquisition were not publicly disclosed, these moves are anticipated to have a positive impact on Ziff Davis' overall operations and market presence.
news.headline: Ziff Davis completes 3 acquisitions in Q2 2025, including cybersecurity and health/wellness companies. Financial details not disclosed.

news.summary: CI Global Asset Management, based in Toronto, has recently revealed updates for its investment funds. The company announced alterations in the risk ratings for three of its funds. Additionally, a name change was declared for CMCX. Further details regarding the specific changes and the impacts on the funds were not provided.
news.headline: CI Global Asset Management in Toronto changes risk ratings for three investment funds and renames CMCX.

news.summary: Oman is intensifying its focus on strategic investment to expedite economic diversification. A recent advisory report by Oxford Business Group delves into the country's drive to diversify its economy through targeted investments in key sectors. This approach aims to boost economic growth and reduce dependence on traditional industries. The report analyzes Oman's initiatives to attract investments in high-impact sectors, highlighting the potential for significant growth. This move comes as Oman aims to strengthen its economy and reduce reliance on oil and gas revenue. The report underlines the importance of this strategy in achieving long-term sustainability.
news.headline: New report by Oxford Business Group and Oman Investment Authority highlights Oman's economic diversification through strategic investments.

news.summary: In New York, effective July 1, Storage Post Self Storage has taken over management of three Sofia Storage properties located in Brooklyn and Manhattan. The transition involves Storage Post staff being present at the properties to facilitate the transfer of both current and new self-storage customers to Storage Post. Future enhancements planned by Storage Post include the implementation of personal access codes for tenants to enter the facility and use the elevators. Additionally, the company will introduce climate-controlled storage options at the facilities.
news.headline: Storage Post Self Storage acquires 3 Sofia Storage properties in Brooklyn and Manhattan. Plans for improvements to include electronic entry codes and climate-controlled storage.

news.summary: In Cincinnati, global payments technology leader Worldpay® has revealed plans to enhance its presence in the Asia Pacific market by incorporating domestic acquiring capabilities in Thailand. This strategic move is aimed at empowering global merchants to cater to local consumers, leveraging preferred payment methods, enhancing authorization rates, bolstering fraud prevention, and facilitating swift settlements. The expansion underscores Worldpay's commitment to advancing commerce by offering tailored solutions and boosting operational efficiency.
news.headline: Worldpay enters Thai market, expands in Asia Pacific with domestic acquiring capabilities, aims to boost commerce for global merchants.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Aztec Group appointed Jose Sobrinho as the new Head of U.S. Technology. In this capacity, Jose will be responsible for overseeing and leading the Group's technology projects based in the U.S. He will collaborate closely with Charlotte Light, the Chief Technology Officer.
news.headline: Aztec Group appoints Jose Sobrinho as Head of U.S. Technology to lead tech initiatives in the U.S. partnering with Charlotte Light, Chief.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, MiL.k, a prominent blockchain-based point integration platform by MiL.k Partners Co., Ltd., unveiled the release of its on-chain rewards platform, USD1 Loyalty Hub, solely on BNB Chain. This new project aims to provide...
news.headline: MiL.k launches USD1 Loyalty Hub on BNB Chain, bringing real-world rewards on-chain. Officially launched in Seoul, South Korea with MiL.k Partners Co., Ltd. platform.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, KORE Group Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: KORE), a major player in the Internet of Things sector, was included in the Russell Microcap® Index as part of the 2025 reconstitution of the Russell indexes. This move became effective after a significant event.

news.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc., a global Fintech leader, has announced an acquisition that will bolster its global fund distribution, data, and regulatory service capabilities, solidifying its position at the convergence point of funds and distributors. The acquisition, disclosed on July 3, 2025, is set to enhance Broadridge's operations in both London and New York. This move signifies a strategic step to strengthen the company's presence, leveraging its expertise in fund management.
news.headline: Broadridge to acquire Acolin, strengthening global fund distribution and regulatory services. July 3, 2025.

news.summary: In Montreal on July 3, 2025, Dollarama Inc. (TSX: DOL) disclosed that it has been granted permission by the Toronto Stock Exchange ("TSX") to extend its normal course issuer bid. This renewal allows the Corporation to repurchase a specified number of its shares on the TSX. The bid enables Dollarama to acquire up to a certain amount of outstanding common shares, following certain guidelines and restrictions.
news.headline: Dollarama Inc. (TSX: DOL) renews normal course issuer bid approved by TSX for share repurchases.

news.summary: ZINFI Technologies, Inc., based in Pleasanton, California, has been recognized as a top leader in Partner Relationship Management for Summer 2025 by G2. They received the highest satisfaction rating in the industry. This achievement highlights the company's dedication to Unified Partner Management (UPM) solutions. This accomplishment was announced on July 3, 2025.
news.headline: ZINFI ranked highest in customer satisfaction on G2 Summer 2025 PRM Grid, named industry leader.

news.summary: Pittsburgh-based Magna5 has been acknowledged as one of the top Managed Service Providers globally, securing the 39th spot on the prestigious 2025 Channel Partners MSP 501 list. The company stood out among a vast pool of competitors to achieve this distinction. This list, which recognizes excellence in the industry, includes thousands of managed service providers from around the world.
news.headline: Magna5 ranks #39 on 2025 MSP 501 list, among world's top providers. Competitive list of thousands.

news.summary: A new high-rise community in Nashville's Gulch neighborhood is set to bring 396 homes to the area. Mill Creek Residential, a prominent developer, owner-operator, and investment manager with a focus on high-quality rental housing in the U.S., made the announcement on July 3, 2025. This development marks a significant addition to the residential options in The Gulch, further solidifying its appeal as a sought-after neighborhood in Nashville.
news.headline: Mill Creek starts preleasing at Modera McGavock in Nashville, adding 396 homes to The Gulch. Leading developer Mill Creek Residential specializes in premier rental housing.

news.summary: A notable announcement was made in Lawrence, Kansas on July 3, 2025, as Contemporary Services Corporation (CSC), renowned for their expertise in crowd management and event security, stated that they have been chosen as the official provider for event staff, security, and crowd management services for the University of Kansas. This decision marks a significant move as CSC solidifies its position as a leader in the industry.
news.headline: CSC to provide event services for University of Kansas athletics. Hiring for game day positions.

news.summary: Cornerstone Capital Bank, a leading national provider of residential mortgage finance and loan servicing solutions, has formed a partnership with Tresidio Homes in Eagle, Idaho, on July 3, 2025. The collaboration aims to provide fast, friendly, and innovative financing options to consumers and businesses. Cornerstone Capital Bank specializes in offering a wide range of financial services, including residential mortgage finance and loan servicing solutions. This partnership is expected to benefit both companies and their clients by combining expertise and resources to enhance financing options.
news.headline: Cornerstone Capital Bank partners with Tresidio Homes to revolutionize home financing in Treasure Valley. Fast, friendly service.

news.summary: In Boston on July 3, 2025, Wayfair Inc. (NYSE:W), a leading home goods retailer, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025, concluding on June 30. The results are set to be unveiled before the market opens on August 4, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for 8 a.m. on the same day to discuss these results further.
news.headline: Wayfair (NYSE: W) to release Q2 2025 results on Aug 4, 2025. Conference call at 8 a.m. EST. #earnings #financials

news.summary: Regenx has obtained permits to resume operations at its facility in Tennessee. This development is expected to significantly impact the company's production capacity, benefiting various stakeholders. Additionally, the Department of Energy (DOE) has formally requested a comprehensive proposal for the recovery of critical minerals. This initiative aims to support the advancement of clean technology goals in the United States, emphasizing the importance of sustainable practices in resource extraction. Overall, these moves signify important progress in the realms of innovation and environmental consciousness, aligning with global efforts towards a greener future.
news.headline: Regenx Tech Corp gets permits for Tennessee facility, DOE requests proposal for critical minerals recovery, supporting clean tech.

news.summary: Iridium Communications Inc., a prominent global voice and data satellite communications provider trading as Nasdaq: IRDM, based in McLean, Virginia, has announced a forthcoming conference call scheduled for Thursday, July 24, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The call aims to address the company's recent developments and future plans.
news.headline: Iridium to release Q2 2025 results on July 24, 2025, and host call at 8:30 am ET.

news.summary: In Halifax, Nova Scotia on July 3, 2025, Erdene Resource Development Corporation (TSX:ERD | MSE:ERDN) has signed an option agreement to buy up to 80% of the Tereg Uul copper-gold porphyry prospect. This prospect is situated roughly 10 kilometers southwest of the Oyu Tolgoi deposit.

news.summary: In Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, on July 3, 2025, BioCryst Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: BCRX) revealed that the compensation committee of its board of directors authorized the distribution of restricted stock units (RSUs) to eight new employees. These RSUs encompass a total of 57,000 shares of BioCryst common stock and were awarded on July 1, 2025, as crucial incentives for the new hires joining the company. news.summary: Peter Märkl, the general counsel of Bitcoin Suisse, expressed disapproval of the current stablecoin regulations in the EU and Switzerland, citing them as insufficient and overly restrictive.
news.headline: Bitcoin Suisse legal head highlights deficiencies in EU, Swiss stablecoin rules; Peter Märkl criticizes regulations as insufficient and cumbersome.

news.summary: Ero Copper Corp. (TSX: ERO, NYSE: ERO) has announced the successful start of commercial production at the Tucumã Operation in Pará State, Brazil, effective July 1, 2025. Following the commissioning of the third filter press and plant modifications in June, the operation has maintained throughput levels surpassing 75% of its design capacity. This achievement marks a significant milestone for the Company in its operations.
news.headline: Ero Copper's Tucumã Operation in Brazil achieves commercial production on July 1, 2025, exceeding 75% throughput.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO), a prominent music, entertainment, and technology platform, revealed a strategic collaboration with Synervoz Communications, Inc. This partnership aims to develop innovative products and experiences for the evolving voice technology sector on native devices and operating systems. Additionally, LiveOne and Synervoz will join forces to cater to LiveOne's increasing business-to-business (B2B) projects.
news.headline: LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO) partners with Synervoz for Voice AI & B2B growth, creating new products to power the next wave of voice; focusing on LiveOne's B2B initiatives.
